architecture.summary: Cross-process rate-limit state file + global reconciler lock + persistent label cache. Brainstorm completed with 3-agent analysis.

integrations.summary: GitHub REST API only. Uses existing gh CLI. Shared state via .specweave/state/ JSON files.

ui-ux.summary: Dashboard rate-limit display on overview page showing remaining/limit.

performance.summary: Reduces API calls from 100-490 to <20 per sync. Cross-process coordination prevents storm scenarios.

security.summary: No new auth. Shared rate-limit file is local only. No secrets in state files.

edge-cases.summary: Stale rate-limit file: validate via gh api rate_limit periodically. Lock file cleanup on crash: 5min TTL. Concurrent file writes: atomic read-modify-write with retry.
